final:
module watchdog_timer (
    input clk,
    input reset_n,
    input pet_signal,
    input [3:0] timeout, // Timeout period in clock cycles
    output reg reset_out
);

reg [3:0] anti_counter;

always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
    if (!reset_n) begin
        anti_counter <= 0;
        reset_out <= 0;
    end else begin
        if (pet_signal) begin
            anti_counter <= 0; // Reset the anti_counter when pet signal is received
            reset_out <= 0; // No need to reset the system
        end else if (anti_counter < timeout) begin
            anti_counter <= anti_counter + 1; // Increment the anti_counter
            reset_out <= 0; // No reset yet
        end else begin
            reset_out <= 1; // Output reset signal when timeout is reached
        end
    end
end

endmodule
